inputs.text: A stunning Korean idol-style woman with a rose gold short bob cut, oval face with elegant monolid eyes, dreamy ethereal expression gazing softly into distance. Half body waist up portrait, slight low angle looking up creating an empowering perspective. She wears sleek black athletic wear with sporty chic styling, standing in a modern art gallery with minimalist white walls and abstract sculptures softly blurred behind her. Golden hour warm side light streaming through floor-to-ceiling windows, casting honeyed highlights across her flawless porcelain skin with visible pores and natural texture. Shot on 85mm f/1.4 lens, creamy bokeh dissolving the gallery backdrop. Cinematic color grading with warm amber tones, styled dewy makeup, soft coral lips, subtle highlighter on cheekbones. Hyperrealistic SDXL quality, no text, no watermarks.
lowres, blurry, bad anatomy, deformed, watermark, signature, extra fingers, cartoon, anime, painting
